items.definition_en: A father of your husband or wife is your father-in-law.
items.example_en: My father-in-law is visiting us this weekend.

items.definition_en: A mother of your husband or wife is your mother-in-law.
items.example_en: She helped her mother-in-law prepare dinner.

items.definition_en: A boy or man who shares one biological parent with you is your half-brother.
items.example_en: My half-brother lives in another city.

items.definition_en: A girl or woman who shares one biological parent with you is your half-sister.
items.example_en: I get along well with my half-sister.

items.definition_en: A son of your stepparent is your stepbrother.
items.example_en: My stepbrother started college last year.

items.definition_en: A daughter of your stepparent is your stepsister.
items.example_en: I often play games with my stepsister.

items.definition_en: A father of your grandparent is your great-grandfather.
items.example_en: My great-grandfather used to be a sailor.

items.definition_en: A mother of your grandparent is your great-grandmother.
items.example_en: Her great-grandmother lives in the countryside.

items.definition_en: A man who acts as a role model or guide like a father is a father figure.
items.example_en: My coach has always been a father figure to me.

items.definition_en: A parent who raises a child without a partner is a single parent.
items.example_en: She is a single parent working two jobs.

items.definition_en: A person who has no brothers or sisters is an only child.
items.example_en: He grew up as an only child.

items.definition_en: A female chosen as a spiritual parent at a child's baptism is a godmother.
items.example_en: My godmother sends me a card every birthday.

items.definition_en: A male chosen as a spiritual parent at a child's baptism is a godfather.
items.example_en: His godfather taught him to fish.

items.definition_en: A child for whom you act as godparent is your godchild.
items.example_en: She bought a gift for her godchild.

items.definition_en: A person who legally adopts a child is an adoptive parent.
items.example_en: Her adoptive parent supported her at every step.

items.definition_en: The woman who gave birth to a child is the biological mother.
items.example_en: He met his biological mother as an adult.

items.definition_en: The man whose genes a child carries is the biological father.
items.example_en: He found his biological father through a DNA test.

items.definition_en: The wife of your son is your daughter-in-law.
items.example_en: My daughter-in-law is very helpful.

items.definition_en: The husband of your daughter is your son-in-law.
items.example_en: We invited our son-in-law for dinner.

items.definition_en: A child of your son or daughter is your grandchild.
items.example_en: She enjoys knitting sweaters for her grandchild.
